message.abstract:
<jats:title>Abstract</jats:title>
                <jats:p>Limited COVID-19 vaccines in many countries have delayed mass-immunization. Although individuals fully vaccinated with Vaxzevria (AstraZeneca) have higher antibody levels than those with CoronaVac (Sinovac), heterologous prime-boost with CoronaVac-Vaxzevria yielded comparable antibody levels to two-dose Vaxzevria. Combination use of different available vaccines may be warranted in Thailand, which faces limited vaccine choice and supply.</jats:p>
title: Immune response elicited from heterologous SARS-CoV-2 vaccination: Sinovac (CoronaVac) followed by AstraZeneca (Vaxzevria)

reference.unstructured: Sharma K , Koirala A , Nicolopoulos K , Chiu C , Wood N , Britton PN . Vaccines for COVID-19: Where do we stand in 2021? Paediatr Respir Rev. In press 2021.
